mapper.select: SELECT w_tme.work_id , p.project_id , t.task_id , u.user_code , w_cls.work_name AS workNameLabel , w_tme.work_date , w_tme.spent_content , w_tme.spent_hour , SUM(w_tme.spent_hour) OVER (ORDER BY w_tme.work_id) AS countSpentHour , SUM(w_tme.spent_hour) OVER () AS totalSpentHour , w_tme.created_at , w_tme.updated_at , p.project_title , u.user_name , t.task_title FROM work_time w_tme LEFT JOIN project P ON w_tme.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_code = w_tme.user_code LEFT JOIN work_classification w_cls ON w_tme.work_name = w_cls.task_classification_id LEFT JOIN task t ON t.task_id = w_tme.task_id WHERE w_tme.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY w_tme.work_id
